parameters.query:
-- Enriquecimento com centro de custo baseado no CNPJ do tomador
SELECT 
  $1 as chave_nf,
  cc.id_centro_custos
FROM auxiliary.centro_custos cc
WHERE cc.cnpj = $2
  OR cc.nome ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO auxiliary.service_nf (
  chave_nf, numero_nf, serie_nf, data_emissao,
  cnpj_prestador, razao_social_prestador, 
  cnpj_tomador, razao_social_tomador,
  valor_servico, valor_deducoes, base_calculo,
  aliquota_iss, valor_iss, valor_pis, valor_cofins,
  valor_inss, valor_ir, valor_csll,
  discriminacao_servico, codigo_servico, situacao,
  id_centro_custo, created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4::date, $5, $6, $7, $8,
  $9::numeric, $10::numeric, $11::numeric,
  $12::numeric, $13::numeric, $14::numeric, $15::numeric,
  $16::numeric, $17::numeric, $18::numeric,
  $19, $20, $21, $22::integer,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
)
ON CONFLICT (chave_nf)
DO UPDATE SET 
  razao_social_prestador = EXCLUDED.razao_social_prestador,
  razao_social_tomador = EXCLUDED.razao_social_tomador,
  valor_servico = EXCLUDED.valor_servico,
  valor_deducoes = EXCLUDED.valor_deducoes,
  base_calculo = EXCLUDED.base_calculo,
  aliquota_iss = EXCLUDED.aliquota_iss,
  valor_iss = EXCLUDED.valor_iss,
  valor_pis = EXCLUDED.valor_pis,
  valor_cofins = EXCLUDED.valor_cofins,
  valor_inss = EXCLUDED.valor_inss,
  valor_ir = EXCLUDED.valor_ir,
  valor_csll = EXCLUDED.valor_csll,
  discriminacao_servico = EXCLUDED.discriminacao_servico,
  codigo_servico = EXCLUDED.codigo_servico,
  situacao = EXCLUDED.situacao,
  id_centro_custo = EXCLUDED.id_centro_custo,
  updated_at = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE 
  service_nf.razao_social_prestador IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.razao_social_prestador
  OR service_nf.razao_social_tomador IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.razao_social_tomador
  OR service_nf.valor_servico IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_servico
  OR service_nf.valor_deducoes IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_deducoes
  OR service_nf.base_calculo IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.base_calculo
  OR service_nf.aliquota_iss IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.aliquota_iss
  OR service_nf.valor_iss IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_iss
  OR service_nf.valor_pis IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_pis
  OR service_nf.valor_cofins IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_cofins
  OR service_nf.valor_inss IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_inss
  OR service_nf.valor_ir IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_ir
  OR service_nf.valor_csll IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_csll
  OR service_nf.discriminacao_servico IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.discriminacao_servico
  OR service_nf.codigo_servico IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.codigo_servico
  OR service_nf.situacao IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.situacao
  OR service_nf.id_centro_custo IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.id_centro_custo
RETURNING chave_nf, numero_nf, valor_servico, situacao, id_centro_custo;
